title: leontopodium × dubium
intro: Leontopodium × dubium, also known as Edelweiss, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is native to the European Alps. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and has been used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy among natural health enthusiasts. Edelweiss can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
